column6:
- Using a custom 37-bit format. 
- Standard Wavelynx packaging


# Enable Prox-Filter W37-6 with Badge ID >= 213,400,100
BS_SET, FILTER , BS_FILTER_LF
BS_AUG, FILTER , BS_FILTER_FUNC_ME
BS_SET, NUM_BITS , 37
BS_FILTER_MASK, 0 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_MASK, 1 , 0x7F
BS_FILTER_MASK, 2 , 0xFF
BS_FILTER_MASK, 3 , 0xFF
BS_FILTER_MASK, 4 , 0xFE

BS_FILTER_VALUE, 0 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 1 , 0x19
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 2 , 0x70
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 3 , 0x74
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 4 , 0x48
